intro: A hooded figure leans against a back-alley wall and beckons you closer with one finger.
title: The Informant
description: The informant sells directions to those who can pay. The tip charts the routes ahead onto your World Map and comes with a Treasure-Map Fragment. Or keep your coin and walk on.

1.label: Buy the tip ({{money, money}})
1.tooltip:
(+) Reveal the onward routes onto your World Map
(+) Gain a Treasure-Map Fragment
(-) Costs a fee
1.selected: You pass over the coin, and the figure murmurs directions in your ear...

2.label: Walk on
2.selected: You shake your head and keep walking.

tipped: The routes ahead are charted onto your World Map, and you pocket a Treasure-Map Fragment. (Press M to view.)
